languages.text: {n}Вы бросаете взгляд на планету через обзорный экран мостика... и внезапно вас охватывает ужас. Невыносимое, выворачивающее чувство пустоты причиняет {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}страшную боль разуму{/d}. Планета — эпицентр этой пустоты, и она высасывает из всего окружающего энергию самой жизни.{/n}

{n}You look at the planet through the bridge observation screen... and suddenly you are struck with terror. An unbearable, gut-wrenching sense of emptiness inflicts {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}agony on your mind{/d}. The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы бросаете взгляд на планету через обзорный экран мостика... и внезапно вас охватывает ужас. languages.text: {n}宇宙船のブリッジの観測画面を通して、惑星を眺めていると、突然恐怖に襲われる。耐え難い、胃を痛めるような虚無感に、心が苦しむ。惑星は虚無の震源地であり、その周囲のあらゆるものを生命のエネルギーを吸い取っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You look at the planet through the bridge observation screen... and suddenly you are struck with terror. An unbearable, gut-wrenching sense of emptiness inflicts agony on your mind. The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}宇宙船のブリッジの観測画面を通して、惑星を眺めていると、突然恐怖に襲われる。耐え難い、胃を痛めるような虚無感に、心が苦しむ。惑星は虚無の震源地であり、その周囲のあらゆるものを生命のエネルギーを吸い取っている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Miras el planeta por la pantalla de observación del puente... y de pronto sientes un terror espantoso. Un vacío insoportable te retuerce las entrañas y llena tu {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}mente de agonía{/d}. El planeta es el epicentro de este vacío, que absorbe la vida de todo cuanto lo rodea.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You look at the planet through the bridge observation screen... and suddenly you are struck with terror. An unbearable, gut-wrenching sense of emptiness inflicts {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}agony on your mind{/d}. The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Miras el planeta por la pantalla de observación del puente... y de pronto sientes un terror espantoso. Un vacío insoportable te retuerce las entrañas y llena tu {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}mente de agonía{/d}. El planeta es el epicentro de este vacío, que absorbe la vida de todo cuanto lo rodea.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你透过舰桥观测屏望向那颗行星……恐惧骤然袭来。一种难以忍受、直击脏腑的虚无感{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}折磨着你的心智{/d}。这颗行星正是那虚无的源头，它正从周围的一切中吮吸着生命能量。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You look at the planet through the bridge observation screen... and suddenly you are struck with terror. An unbearable, gut-wrenching sense of emptiness inflicts {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}agony on your mind{/d}. The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你透过舰桥观测屏望向那颗行星……恐惧骤然袭来。一种难以忍受、直击脏腑的虚无感{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}折磨着你的心智{/d}。这颗行星正是那虚无的源头，它正从周围的一切中吮吸着生命能量。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als du den Planeten über den Überwachungsmonitor auf der Brücke betrachtest, wirst du mit einem Mal von Entsetzen gepackt. Ein unerträgliches Gefühl der Leere breitet sich {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}schmerzhaft in deinem Verstand aus{/d}. Das Epizentrum dieser Leere ist der Planet selbst, der seiner gesamten Umgebung Lebensenergie entzieht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You look at the planet through the bridge observation screen... and suddenly you are struck with terror. An unbearable, gut-wrenching sense of emptiness inflicts {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}agony on your mind{/d}. The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Köprü gözlem ekranından gezegene bakıyorsun... Aniden dehşete kapılıyorsun. Dayanılmaz, mide bulandırıcı bir boşluk hissi {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}zihnine ızdırap veriyor{/d}. Gezegen, bu boşluğun merkez üssü ve etrafındaki her şeyden yaşam enerjisinin ta kendisini emiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You look at the planet through the bridge observation screen... and suddenly you are struck with terror. An unbearable, gut-wrenching sense of emptiness inflicts {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}agony on your mind{/d}. The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}

Gezegen, bu boşluğun merkez üssü ve etrafındaki her şeyden yaşam enerjisinin ta kendisini emiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous observez la planète sur l'écran de la passerelle… et soudainement, vous vous sentez {mf|submergé|submergée} par une inexplicable terreur et {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_Psyker}votre esprit est envahi{/d} d'un sentiment insupportable de vide dont cette planète est l'épicentre, comme si elle aspirait l'énergie vitale de tout ce qui l'entoure.{/n}

The planet is the epicentre of this emptiness, and it is sucking the energy of life itself out of everything around it.{/n}
